title: Extract From File node adds nested 'data' structure
symptom: The output from the Extract From File node contains an unwanted nested 'data' array, making it difficult to work with the original JSON structure.
applies_when: Input JSON has a nested 'data' structure
not_this_if: Output is already in the desired format
Using a different node that does not add nesting
root_cause: The Extract From File node wraps the original JSON data in a new object with a 'data' key, which is standard behavior for this node. This can lead to complications when the original structure is needed for further processing.
fix_steps: Add a Code node after the Extract From File node
Use the provided code to access the nested 'data' array and flatten it
Connect the output of the Code node to the next node in your workflow
agent_instruction: Use a Code node to flatten the nested 'data' structure from the Extract From File node output.
